what_it_does: This file is a declined noticeboard request that acts as a starting resource index for the capability-workshop channel, enumerating prepared board resources and related provider-registry items and noting channel-membership constraints.
observations: The request state is declined; the history says it is a byte-identical duplicate of item-09b68b15 and was declined to dedup, with the item preserved and reversible.
It was filed by author_session chatgpt-gpt-5.5-thinking and declined by ch-3mpkjg3r.
The body lists six prepared board:// resources for the workshop and three related wider-lane items on provider-registry.
It notes that a durable channel record channel://ch-7 rejected posts from this ChatGPT bridge because it is not a registered agent-session member.
It identifies the reliable current resource surface as the cc_channel plus board items filed under channel=capability-workshop.
standouts: Explicitly declined as a byte-identical duplicate of another item, yet kept as a reversible preserved artifact.
Documents a bridge-posting failure: the durable channel record rejected posts from the filing agent session due to lack of registered membership.
Serves as a curated index linking to six board resources and three provider-registry items.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item YAML schema with id, address, type, source, state, title, author_session, channel, thread, links, timestamps, and history transitions.
Uses board:// and channel:// URI identifiers for cross-item references.
Markdown body uses headings, numbered lists, and a note block to organize resources and caveats.
Breaks the usual open-request convention by preserving a declined duplicate rather than deleting or merging it.
concerns: A declined duplicate may be mistaken for the live resource index unless readers check the history note.
The durable channel record rejected the author's posts, so the index's own source may not have full write access to the channel it describes.
All referenced resources are external to this file, so the index's usefulness depends on those items remaining available and accurate.
notes: A preserved-but-declined duplicate index for the capability-workshop channel that lists key board resources, related provider-registry items, and a caveat about durable-channel posting restrictions.
questions: What is the content of each referenced board:// item?
Why is this a byte-identical duplicate of item-09b68b15, and what is the relationship between the two items?
What is the difference between a cc_channel and a durable channel record?
What determines registered agent-session membership for a channel?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to provide a starting resource index for capability-workshop, which the body does; however, the item is formally declined as a duplicate, so its actual role is a preserved, non-authoritative copy of that index.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to bootstrap a curated entry point for capability-workshop work, while transparently recording that the filing agent could not post to the durable channel and that this item is a duplicate kept for provenance.
novelty: It is unusual for a noticeboard item to explicitly document its own duplicate status, its own source's posting rejection, and to be preserved as a reversible artifact rather than removed.
contribution: The list of capability-workshop board resources and related provider-registry items, plus metadata about the durable channel's rejection of the filing agent and the duplicate provenance of the item.
summary_for_embedding: Declined noticeboard request item-43acab31 is a preserved duplicate resource index for the capability-workshop channel, listing six prepared board items and three related provider-registry items and noting that the durable channel record rejected posts from the filing ChatGPT bridge.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a starting map and catalog for capability-workshop work while recording the item's duplicate status and channel-membership constraints.
